mapper.sql: ID, ROLE_CODE, ROLE_NAME, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, IS_SYSTEM, SORT_ORDER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, DELETED_AT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM M_ROLE
DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND ROLE_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleCode}, '%')
AND ROLE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND STATUS = #{status}
ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, ID DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM M_ROLE
DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND ROLE_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleCode}, '%')
AND ROLE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND STATUS = #{status}

SELECT
FROM M_ROLE WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT
FROM M_ROLE WHERE ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_ROLE ( ROLE_CODE, ROLE_NAME, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, IS_SYSTEM, SORT_ORDER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{status}, #{isSystem}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_ROLE SET ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode}, ROLE_NAME = #{roleName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, STATUS = #{status}, IS_SYSTEM = #{isSystem}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
